subcodes.first_line: The Tablet of God hath been sent down in truth, and from the horizon of His heaven hath shone forth the Luminary of proof from the presence of the All-Merciful. Thus hath it been decreed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لوح الله قد نزل بالحق و اشرق من افق سمائه نیر البرهان من لدی الرحمن کذلک قضی
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @power of the Manifestation of God, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
